title: Better AntiChat
description: The AntiChat plugin helps maintain a clean chat environment by automatically filtering unwanted messages and punishing players. It fights against advertising, insults, and spam.
body: AntiChat is a powerful chat administration tool designed for automatic moderation and maintaining order on a server. It uses multiple customizable filters to detect various violations. The plugin identifies and blocks advertising based on a list of keywords and domain names. The insult filter detects profanity and also checks whether the message is directed at another player to prevent false positives. Additionally, AntiChat prevents spam by blocking repetitive messages from the same player. When a violation is detected, the plugin automatically mutes the player for a configured duration by dispatching server commands.
